fallback_mode: LIVE_FIRST_20_LOCAL_FIRST_OK=true (preflight only) or omit Supabase for non-preflight paths — local files still authoritative

required_env_databank_client.SUPABASE_KEY_or_SERVICE_ROLE: resolve_supabase_jwt_key() uses SUPABASE_KEY first, else SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (trading_ai.global_layer.supabase_env_keys)

preflight_also_accepts.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: Same resolution as databank sync — no need to duplicate into SUPABASE_KEY unless you want both set for clarity.

remote_sync_success.trade_upsert: upsert_trade_event returns True after PostgREST success
remote_sync_success.not_success: returns False — check logs for create_client failure, RLS, schema mismatch, or network

incomplete_paths.service_role_only: RESOLVED: SERVICE_ROLE alone now initializes the sync client when SUPABASE_KEY is unset.
incomplete_paths.mitigation: Prefer SUPABASE_KEY for clarity; SERVICE_ROLE is accepted as fallback.

tables_referenced_in_code: trades, performance, ceo_briefings, platform_performance (read snapshot — optional)
